extension.summary: Github repository for Skippy - Video Segment Skipper for Kodi and companion Segment Editor
extension.description: Installs Skippy, Segment Editor and other Kodi addons

extension.summary: Automatically seeks back 1 second after 5 seconds of playback to fix subtitle display issues
extension.description:
This service add-on automatically waits 5 seconds after video playback starts, then seeks back 1 second to trigger subtitle re-synchronization. This fixes the common issue where embedded subtitles don't appear until manually seeking backward.
The add-on runs silently in the background and only activates when video playback begins. You can enable or disable it in the add-on settings.

extension.summary: Skippy: skip, mark, and edit video segments (intros, recaps, credits, and more) using local or online data.
extension.description: All-in-one Kodi companion for chapter-style workflows: automatically skip or prompt on segments, mark new ranges during playback, and open a full segment editor for .edl and Matroska-style chapters.xml sidecars. Highly configurable keywords, EDL action types, dialogs, and optional online lookups (TheIntroDB / IntroDB.app). Separate keymaps for marker (skippy_marker.xml) and editor (skippy_editor.xml).
